rationale: The citing paper focuses on hard-discounter entry effects in Dutch brick-and-mortar grocery markets, while the cited paper studies an item-based loyalty-program switch at a European online grocer, so direct topical overlap appears limited from the notes. However, both involve household-level modeling of store visits/spending behavior in grocery settings, and the only match evidence is a bare DOI reference with no citation-context text, so it cannot be safely dropped as clearly incidental.
